prompt: Create a vertical photorealistic fashion portrait of an adult androgynous-styled woman with black shoulder-length bob hair, pale smooth skin, and a calm confident expression. She is posed from mid-thigh to head against a dark black studio background with subtle film grain and faint dust speckles, body angled slightly left while facing the camera. She wears a sharp black tailored blazer over a crisp white button-down shirt with a deep open neckline, tucked into high-waisted black trousers, giving a stylish executive “big boss” look. Her left hand is raised to the temple of her sunglasses as if adjusting them. The image is mostly high-contrast black and white, but the round wire-frame sunglasses have vivid translucent red lenses as the only strong color accent. Use dramatic softbox lighting from the upper left, sculpted shadows, glossy highlights on the hair, clean skin detail, cinematic editorial photography, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric folds, elegant monochrome tonality, and a vertical 9:16 composition. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no props beyond the sunglasses and outfit.
promptEn: Create a vertical photorealistic fashion portrait of an adult androgynous-styled woman with black shoulder-length bob hair, pale smooth skin, and a calm confident expression. She is posed from mid-thigh to head against a dark black studio background with subtle film grain and faint dust speckles, body angled slightly left while facing the camera. She wears a sharp black tailored blazer over a crisp white button-down shirt with a deep open neckline, tucked into high-waisted black trousers, giving a stylish executive “big boss” look. Her left hand is raised to the temple of her sunglasses as if adjusting them. The image is mostly high-contrast black and white, but the round wire-frame sunglasses have vivid translucent red lenses as the only strong color accent. Use dramatic softbox lighting from the upper left, sculpted shadows, glossy highlights on the hair, clean skin detail, cinematic editorial photography, shallow depth of field, realistic fabric folds, elegant monochrome tonality, and a vertical 9:16 composition. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no props beyond the sunglasses and outfit.
promptZh: 创作一张竖屏写实时尚肖像，主角为一位成年中性风女性，留着 黑色 的齐肩波波头，皮肤白皙细腻，神情沉稳自信。画面采用中景构图（从大腿中部到头部），背景为深黑色摄影棚背景，带有细微的胶片颗粒感和淡淡的尘埃斑点，身体略微向左倾斜，正视镜头。她身穿剪裁利落的黑色西装外套，内搭领口深开的干练白色衬衫，下身穿着高腰黑色长裤，展现出时尚的职场“大女主”气场。她的左手抬起，正触碰墨镜镜腿，仿佛在调整眼镜。画面整体为高对比度的黑白风格，唯有圆框墨镜的镜片呈现出鲜艳的半透明 红色，作为唯一的强色彩点缀。采用来自左上方的戏剧性柔光箱照明，塑造立体阴影，头发带有光泽高光，皮肤细节清晰，呈现电影级时尚摄影质感，浅景深，真实的布料褶皱，优雅的单色调，采用 9:16 竖屏构图。无文字，无水印，无多余人物，除墨镜和服装外无其他道具。
